subcodes.first_line: O Qasim! Take for thyself a portion of this bounty, then rest content therewith, detached from all else, for verily it shall suffice thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قاسم خذ لنفسک قسمه من هذا الفضل ثم اکف بها عن العالمین و انها یکفیک عن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
